name: 30-Min MBA Admissions Call
description: Introductory call with MBA admissions advisor to discuss program fit, application timeline, and prerequisites for online MBA programs.

name: Home Contractor Estimate
description: 45-minute on-site or virtual consultation for home improvement estimate. Please include the project type and address in the notes.

name: Quick Intro Chat
description: Retired 15-minute general intro slot - replaced by specific event types.

name: Property Walkthrough - 60 Min
description: 60-minute property tour and consultation with a real estate agent. For homes in the Columbus metro area. Please include the MLS number or address.

name: Mortgage Pre-Approval Consult
description: 30-minute call with a loan officer to discuss pre-approval for a home purchase. Please have recent pay stubs and credit score estimate ready.

name: Career Coaching Session
description: 45-minute coaching session focused on career development, resume review, or interview prep for marketing and analytics roles.

name: Client Check-In - 30 Min
description: Recurring 30-minute check-in for Crestline Analytics client project updates and deliverable reviews.

name: Book Club Planning Chat
description: Quick planning call to align on the next book selection, meeting date, and venue for the Columbus book club.

name: Financial Advisor Meeting
description: 45-minute session with financial advisor to review savings goals, car loan paydown strategy, and down payment planning for a home purchase.

name: Running Partner Sync
description: Quick 15-min call to coordinate weekend long run logistics on the Alum Creek trail or Sunbury Rd loop. Runs typically start at 6:30 AM.

name: 15-Min Quick Connect
description: Short 15-minute introductory call for new contacts - use this to get acquainted before scheduling a longer session.

name: 60-Min MBA Deep Dive
description: Extended one-hour session with MBA admissions advisor covering curriculum details, GMAT/GRE waiver options, financial aid, and application essay review.

name: Phone Screening
description: 20-minute phone screening for job candidates or vendor contacts. Please include the role or purpose in the scheduling notes.

name: Home Walk-Through Consult
description: 30-minute virtual or in-person walkthrough consultation with a realtor or home inspector for a Columbus metro property. Please include the address.

name: Informational Interview
description: 30-minute informational interview for professionals interested in marketing analytics or those Andrea is connecting with for career insight.

name: Networking Coffee Chat
description: Casual 25-minute virtual coffee chat for professional networking. Great for new LinkedIn connections, MBA peers, or Columbus analytics community contacts.

name: Referral Introduction
description: Brief 15-minute introduction call for contacts referred by a mutual connection. Includes context-setting and next-step alignment.

name: Planner Check-In
description: 20-minute check-in with a financial planner or project coordinator to review milestones, timelines, and upcoming action items.

name: Budget Review Call
description: 30-minute budget review call for home purchase planning - down payment savings, closing cost estimates, monthly payment scenarios, and contingency reserves.

name: Follow-Up Discussion
description: General-purpose 30-minute follow-up call to continue a prior conversation - suitable for MBA admissions, real estate, or Crestline project debriefs.
